description_long: This is a single bed with a distressed, light-colored wooden frame featuring visible wear and blackened edges, giving it a rustic, urban look. The bed has a rectangular headboard and footboard, both with horizontal cutouts, and sturdy, blocky legs. A thin, white mattress with a subtle grid texture sits atop the frame, and a single, reddish-brown pillow is placed at the head of the bed. The frame appears robust and functional, suitable for utilitarian or industrial urban environments. The overall design is simple and practical, with no visible storage or decorative elements beyond the weathered finish. The bed's proportions suggest it is intended for one person.
description: A rustic, single bed with a distressed wooden frame, white mattress, and a reddish-brown pillow. The design is simple, sturdy, and utilitarian, with visible wear on the wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the footboard with a horizontal cutout and the mattress and pillow partially visible behind it.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bed, the white mattress, and the reddish-brown pillow at the head.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the headboard with a horizontal cutout and the pillow resting against it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, the mattress, and the pillow positioned at the far end.
